Watcher - Class in com.burningcode.jira.rest

WatcherFieldType - Class in com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl
This class is a custom field type that allows users with "Manage Watcher List" permissions to modify users when creating/updating issues.
WatcherFieldType(CustomFieldValuePersister, StringConverter, GenericConfigManager, MultiUserConverter, ApplicationProperties, JiraAuthenticationContext, UserPickerSearchService, FieldVisibilityManager) - Constructor for class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Overridden, calls super constructor.
WatcherResource - Class in com.burningcode.jira.rest
Used for access watcher info for an issue using REST API TODO Replace @AnonymousAllowed TODO Check for user permissions to access watcher info.
WatcherResource() - Constructor for class com.burningcode.jira.rest.WatcherResource
